hooks.command: bash -c 'B="if [ ! -f \"\$H\" ]; then echo \"BLOCKED: validate-no-direct-gitban-state-edit.sh not found at \$H -- protection is DOWN, refusing command (ADR-045)\" >&2; exit 2; fi; exec bash \"\$H\""; H="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.gitban/hooks/validate-no-direct-gitban-state-edit.sh"; if grep -qi microsoft /proc/version 2>/dev/null; then GBX=""; GW="$(where.exe git 2>/dev/null | head -n1 | tr -d "\r")"; if [ -n "$GW" ]; then GWP="$(wslpath "$GW" 2>/dev/null)"; if [ -n "$GWP" ]; then GBX="$(dirname "$(dirname "$GWP")")/bin/bash.exe"; fi; fi; for GB in "/mnt/c/Program Files/Git/bin/bash.exe" "/mnt/c/Program Files/Git/usr/bin/bash.exe" "/mnt/c/Program Files (x86)/Git/bin/bash.exe" "/mnt/c/Program Files (x86)/Git/usr/bin/bash.exe" "$GBX"; do if [ -n "$GB" ] && [ -x "$GB" ]; then export H; exec "$GB" -c "$B"; fi; done; echo "BLOCKED: validate-no-direct-gitban-state-edit.sh is running under WSL bash and no Git Bash was found -- protection cannot run safely under WSL (ADR-045); install Git for Windows or point the hook interpreter at Git Bash" >&2; exit 2; fi; eval "$B"'

bash -c 'B="if [ ! -f \"\$H\" ]; then echo \"BLOCKED: cwd-pin-check.sh not found at \$H -- protection is DOWN, refusing command (ADR-051)\" >&2; exit 2; fi; exec bash \"\$H\""; H="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.gitban/hooks/cwd-pin-check.sh"; if grep -qi microsoft /proc/version 2>/dev/null; then GBX=""; GW="$(where.exe git 2>/dev/null | head -n1 | tr -d "\r")"; if [ -n "$GW" ]; then GWP="$(wslpath "$GW" 2>/dev/null)"; if [ -n "$GWP" ]; then GBX="$(dirname "$(dirname "$GWP")")/bin/bash.exe"; fi; fi; for GB in "/mnt/c/Program Files/Git/bin/bash.exe" "/mnt/c/Program Files/Git/usr/bin/bash.exe" "/mnt/c/Program Files (x86)/Git/bin/bash.exe" "/mnt/c/Program Files (x86)/Git/usr/bin/bash.exe" "$GBX"; do if [ -n "$GB" ] && [ -x "$GB" ]; then export H; exec "$GB" -c "$B"; fi; done; echo "BLOCKED: cwd-pin-check.sh is running under WSL bash and no Git Bash was found -- protection cannot run safely under WSL (ADR-051); install Git for Windows or point the hook interpreter at Git Bash" >&2; exit 2; fi; eval "$B"'
